facebook.caption:
POV: you stop scrolling hotels and just book the one with 5,855 people backing it up.

Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. Private beach. Outdoor pool. Spa. Three bars. Dinner with sand between your toes.

4.8 stars isn't luck. That's consistency.

If you're splitting a beach trip between budget and one splurge night, this is the splurge. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
